syllogism_text: Every single creature that is a cat is a fish. A number of tigers are cats. This means that there are some tigers which are fish.

attempts.code:
% Witness: a tiger that is a cat
tiger(fluffy).
cat(fluffy).

% Rule from first premise: All cats are fish
fish(X) :- cat(X).

% I-conclusion: Some tigers are fish
valid_syllogism :- tiger(X), fish(X).
